# PostScheduler

> PostScheduler is an AI-powered social media autopilot that automatically drafts and schedules unique, non-repetitive posts to LinkedIn and Facebook. It is built using LangChain, Google Gemini, and Supermemory (vector database context) to eliminate repetition.

## Features
- **Smart AI Queuing**: Formulate general theme prompts (e.g., "React development tips") and the AI will auto-create distinct, relevant posts for each scheduled slot.
- **Supermemory Context Integration**: Recalls past generated posts using vector embeddings, ensuring the AI does not repeat similar subtopics or copy previous phrasing.
- **Multi-Platform Posting**: Direct integration with LinkedIn and Facebook (Pages) APIs.
- **Flexible Recurrence**: Post every X hours, days, or minutes up to a custom run count.
- **Logs & Audit Trails**: Real-time status tracking (Scheduled, Published, Failed) with detailed execution log reports.

## Pricing Plans
- **Free Plan**: Free forever. Up to 3 active schedule configurations, 1 connected platform, and max 10 runs per schedule.
- **Pro Plan ($15/month)**: Unlimited schedules, all platforms, unlimited runs, and priority generation queue.
